LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WILLIAM HIGGINS AND WILLIAM UPSON'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. ALTHOUGH AN IDENTIFIED SUM OF MONEY MAY BE A BASIS FOR CONVERSION, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ALLEGE SUCH FACTS WITH THE REQUISITE SPECIFICITY. THERE ALSO IS A QUESTION WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO NAME THE PARTY OR PARTIES WHO PRESENTLY CONTROL THE SEPCIFIC PROPERTY. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
